summary: First-finish smoke test of SPEEDHOME Market Intelligence backend + frontend. Auth, areas, analyze (EN+ID), ROI, compare, saved, register, logout all work. Critical bug: Export XLSX & CSV return 500 due to NameError in analytics.py compute_by_unit_type. Frontend dashboard renders fully with KPIs/AI/rule insights/charts. Login prefilled + sidebar nav + lang switcher OK.
passed: GET /api/ -> 200 service info
POST /api/auth/login (admin) -> 200, sets httpOnly access_token + refresh_token cookies
GET /api/auth/me with cookie -> 200; without cookie -> 401
POST /api/auth/logout -> 200 and Set-Cookie expires both tokens
POST /api/auth/register new user -> 200; duplicate email -> 400
GET /api/areas/autocomplete?q=Mont -> 4 suggestions incl. Mont Kiara + variants
GET /api/areas/all -> 23+ sorted areas
GET /api/analyze?area=Mont Kiara&lang=en -> 200, 40 listings, 6 rule_insights, 7 ai_insights (Claude), full overall stats, by_unit_type(5), furnishing, histogram, psf, data_source=mock
GET /api/analyze?area=Mont Kiara&lang=id -> 200, ai_insights in Bahasa Indonesia
GET /api/analyze?area=&lang=en -> 400 'Area is required'
GET /api/analyze second call -> from_cache=true
POST /api/roi -> 200 with gross_yield=4.72, net_yield=3.98, payback=25.2 (math correct)
POST /api/compare with 3 areas -> 200 comparison array len=3
POST /api/compare with 1 area -> 400; with 6 areas -> 400
POST /api/saved (body {area, payload}) -> 200; GET /api/saved -> items list with overall stats; DELETE works
GET /api/export/history/list -> 200
Frontend /login: split-screen, admin creds prefilled (admin@speedhome.com), submit -> dashboard /
Frontend Dashboard: search 'Mont Kiara' renders all 6 KPI cards, AI insights card, rule insights card, Save/CSV/XLSX buttons
Sidebar nav links present: dashboard, saved, compare, roi, exports, settings
Language switcher and logout button visible

failed.issue: GET /api/export/xlsx and /api/export/csv both return HTTP 500. Root cause: /app/backend/analytics.py line 60 -> groups.setdefault(key, []).append(l)  — variable 'l' is undefined; should be 'li' (loop var on line 58).
failed.evidence: Backend log: NameError: name 'l' is not defined in compute_by_unit_type. Confirmed via curl (CSV size=21 'Internal Server Error') and via frontend export button click (network response status=500).

failed.issue: GET /api/analyze?area=Nonexistent returns HTTP 500 instead of 400 for unknown area.
failed.evidence: curl -> HTTP=500 'Internal Server Error' for area=Nonexistent; spec expects 400 for invalid area.

failed.issue: ROI page did not render result element [data-testid="roi-gross-yield"] within 8s after Calculate click during automated run. Testids exist in source — likely timing or button selector mismatch. Backend /api/roi endpoint itself returns correct results. Needs quick manual verification.
failed.evidence: Playwright timeout waiting for roi-gross-yield after clicking roi-calculate-button.

action_items: FIX /app/backend/analytics.py line 60: change `.append(l)` to `.append(li)` — unblocks XLSX/CSV exports.
In /app/backend/server.py analyze endpoint, validate area against known list and return HTTPException(400) instead of letting it 500.
Verify ROI page result rendering manually (open /roi, submit form, confirm gross/net/payback/annual-income display).
